summary: AI assistant by Anthropic, focused on safety and helpfulness.
editor_note: Claude is the AI assistant that developers actually trust with their code. Where others optimize for impressive demos, Anthropic optimized for reliability and honesty. Claude Code (the CLI) turned it from a chatbot into a genuine engineering tool. The safety-first approach is not a handicap, it is the product.
investors: Google, Spark Capital, Salesforce Ventures, Menlo Ventures
